name: otr2R_outer_repeat
description: Outer-repeat subdomain otr2R of S. pombe centromere 2 on chromosome II, right side. Tandem cassettes of dg (~4.6 kb) and dh (~1.8 kb) elements forming the Clr4-H3K9me-Swi6 pericentric heterochromatin. Cassette count is chromosome-dependent (highest on otr3). Reads multi-map across all six otr arms and to the cenH element in the mat locus.
